channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's Late July 4 Speech Disrupts D.C. Fireworks Schedule
item.description: President Trump's planned 45-minute speech on the National Mall is pushing D.C.'s fireworks later.

item.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump's birthright citizenship order
item.description: The Supreme Court struck down President Trump's executive order restricting birthright citizenship, reaffirming a long-standing constitutional principle.

item.title: Supreme Court to hear AR-15 ban cases next term
item.description: The Supreme Court will hear challenges to local bans on the AR-15 rifle, one of the most popular firearms in the country.

item.title: House GOP agenda stalled again over SAVE Act
item.description: More than a dozen House Republicans blocked a procedural vote on a must-pass defense bill over the GOP's signature election bill, the SAVE Act.
